offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes workflow inefficiencies. We generate weekly insurance claims status summaries instead of manual tracking of claims status through emails and spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of timely updates on claim statuses leads to inefficient workflows.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among adjusters
try_it: Let users try weekly summary generation and email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing claims data
